title: RoutineStep — agent
description: Invoke an omp session with a prompt; capture stdout + structured output. Token counts and cost feed the budget enforcer.

prompt.description: User prompt. Templated. Long prompts are fine; budget caps total LLM tokens, not prompt length.

model.description: Model id (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6). Defaults to the deck's active model setting.

schema.description: JSON Schema (or schema-like object) describing the expected structured output. Validated by Ajv after the agent returns.

strict.description: true: invalid output fails the step. false: best-effort; raw stdout is captured even if parsing fails.

skills_allowed.description: Restrict the agent's native skill surface to this allowlist. Default (omitted): all installed skills available.

mcp_servers_allowed.description: Restrict the agent's MCP tool surface to these server ids. Default (omitted): all installed MCP servers available.
